guardrails.body: Keep slide 4 tied to its main idea.
guardrails.title: Focus

signals.body: End with a clear call to action so people know what to do
signals.title: Close With Purpose

signals.body: Thank the audience for their attention and invite questions before you disappear into
signals.title: Invite Engagement

signals.body: Share your contact information in a way that does not look like spam
signals.title: Provide Contact Details

signals.body: Leave them with one memorable line they will repeat to their friends later
signals.title: Deliver a Final Punchline

summary: Wrap up with clarity and leave the audience wanting more.
title: Finish Strong and Smile
